svg.title: Memory tiers — four-stage persistence
svg.desc: Four memory tiers stacked top to bottom: Tier 1 working memory (00-inbox, current session), Tier 2 episodic memory (07-logs), Tier 3 semantic memory (05-agent — MEMORY.md and memory/), Tier 4 distilled knowledge (03-knowledge). Dashed arrows sink downward as knowledge gets validated.
